description:
A Snort IDS/IPS dashboard.

Based on the setup from IT Security Labs:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WWitHleGFd8

And the original Security Panel dashboard by Tal Bar-Or:

https://grafana.com/grafana/dashboards/3099

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(timestamp) * 1000 AS time,
  temperature AS "Temperature"
FROM system_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp ASC;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(timestamp) * 1000 AS time,
  cpu_usage AS "CPU Usage %",
  disk_usage AS "Disk Usage"
FROM system_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp ASC;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) * 1000 AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE priority = 1
  AND timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) DIV 60
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) * 1000 AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE priority = 2
  AND timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) DIV 60
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) * 1000 AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE priority = 3
  AND timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(STR_TO_DATE(timestamp, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) DIV 60
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(timestamp) * 1000 AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS value,
  CASE
    WHEN priority = 1 THEN 'Critical'
    WHEN priority = 2 THEN 'Moderate'
    WHEN priority = 3 THEN 'Low'
  END AS metric
FROM alerts
WHERE timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY
  metric,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(timestamp) DIV 60
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
  CONCAT(
    severity, ' - ', msg
  ) AS label,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT
    msg,
    CASE 
      WHEN priority = 1 THEN 'Critical'
      WHEN priority = 2 THEN 'Moderate'
      WHEN priority = 3 THEN 'Low'
    END AS severity
  FROM alerts
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
) AS sub
GROUP BY label

SELECT
  proto AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY proto
ORDER BY value DESC;

SELECT
  src_addr AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY src_addr
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  CASE dst_port
    WHEN 20 THEN '20 - FTP'
    WHEN 21 THEN '21 - FTP'
    WHEN 22 THEN '22 - SSH'
    WHEN 23 THEN '23 - Telnet'
    WHEN 25 THEN '25 - SMTP'
    WHEN 53 THEN '53 - DNS'
    WHEN 80 THEN '80 - HTTP'
    WHEN 110 THEN '110 - POP3'
    WHEN 143 THEN '143 - IMAP'
    WHEN 443 THEN '443 - HTTPS'
    WHEN 3306 THEN '3306 - MySQL'
    WHEN 3389 THEN '3389 - RDP'
    WHEN 8080 THEN '8080 - HTTP-Alt'
    ELSE CONCAT(dst_port, ' - Unknown')
  END AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE dst_port IN (
    20, 21, 22, 23, 25, 53, 80, 110, 143, 443, 3306, 3389, 8080
)
  AND timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  dst_addr AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts
WHERE timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
GROUP BY dst_addr
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  (FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt)/60)*60)*1000 AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS value,
  proto AS metric
FROM (
  SELECT
    proto,
    CASE
      WHEN `timestamp` REGEXP 'T.*Z$'
        THEN STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(REPLACE(`timestamp`, 'T', ' '), 'Z', ''), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s.%f')
      WHEN `timestamp` REGEXP 'T'
        THEN STR_TO_DATE(REPLACE(`timestamp`, 'T', ' '), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
      WHEN `timestamp` REGEXP '\\.[0-9]+$'
        THEN STR_TO_DATE(`timestamp`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s.%f')
      ELSE
        STR_TO_DATE(`timestamp`, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
    END AS dt
  FROM alerts
) AS x
WHERE dt BETWEEN FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from}/1000) AND FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to}/1000)
GROUP BY proto, FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(dt)/60)
ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT
  timestamp AS "Time",
  msg AS "Alert",
  src_addr AS "Source",
  dst_addr AS "Destination",
  dst_port AS "Port",
  CASE
    WHEN msg LIKE '%PROTOCOL%' THEN 'Protocol alert'
    WHEN msg LIKE '%http%' THEN 'HTTP'
    ELSE 'Unknown traffic'
  END AS "Alert class",
  CASE priority
    WHEN 1 THEN 'High'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Medium'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'Low'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS "Severity"
FROM alerts
WHERE timestamp >= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__from} / 1000)
  AND timestamp <= FROM_UNIXTIME(${__to} / 1000)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100;

title: Snort IDS/IPS Dashboard
